instruction:
We now define an algorithm: The definition of a(n) is the number of positive integers m for which the harmonic mean of m and n is a positive integer. Given the input x_list (a series of values): [81, 82, 83, 84, 85, 86, 87, 88, 89, 90], determine the corresponding output sequence y_list.

Options:
A. [12, 3, 0, 33, 12, 3, 12, 16, 0, 36]
B. [7, 8, 5, 28, 7, 8, 7, 11, 5, 31]
C. [9, 6, 3, 30, 9, 6, 9, 13, 3, 33]
D. [6, 9, 6, 27, 6, 9, 6, 10, 6, 30]
E. [11, 4, 1, 32, 11, 4, 11, 15, 1, 35]
F. [13, 2, -1, 34, 13, 2, 13, 17, -1, 37]
G. [8, 7, 4, 29, 8, 7, 8, 12, 4, 32]
H. [4, 11, 8, 25, 4, 11, 4, 8, 8, 28]
I. [5, 10, 7, 26, 5, 10, 5, 9, 7, 29]
